cn.description:
Onyx is a revolutionary new utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data.

Using cutting edge AI processing, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.
— Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought.
— Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx, allowing you to zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal.
— Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye.
— Change the time on a photo of a clock.
— Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it seem that it was removed earlier.

...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it.

Onyx is particularly great for a reveal within something ephemeral. Take a photo of someone's shadow, a landscape shot of the clouds, a flicker on a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice.

* Variable Delayed Input
Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken.

* Cutting Edge Technology
Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely.

* Create Unlimited Effects
Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took.

* Your Integrations. Their Camera
The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket.

* Invisible, Advanced Technology
As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx's advanced technology remains hidden and inconspicuous.

* Third Party Integrations
Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including:
— Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input
— Native voice input
— WebFX's Wrist Gestures
— WikiTest
— PeekSmith
— Bridge

...and any compatible third-party app.

Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits.

Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

hk.trackCensoredName: Cat Todo - 備忘錄 & 待辦事項 & 記事本
hk.description:
CatBox Todo 是一款全球愛貓用戶喜愛的待辦App，全新的簡約風格待辦事項應用程式，裡面有生動可愛的貓咪和主題。

• 設計理念
CatBox想讓生動的小貓咪陪伴用戶，提供給用戶舒服的感受。貓咪會有各種日常的動作和撫摸反饋，而且會像助手一樣鼓勵用戶。在Todo的設計上更加還原日常生活的形態，並且最極簡化設計，專注於核心功能和減少干擾。

• 功能特點
• 貓咪會生動的全程陪伴你的日常，不僅在你完成事項的時候進行鼓勵，同時也會有吃飯和睡覺的有趣時候，就像你的朋友一樣。
• 讓待辦事項清晰簡潔——使用 CatBox Todo記錄重要事項，簡單直接。
• 四象限視圖更好的專注重要的事情。
• CatBox Todo支援最新widget，並且會伴隨主題進行替換。
• 生動可愛的貓咪皮膚支援訂閱和單獨購買。
• 利用Apple Intelligence適配iOS 26。

• 隱私政策和使用條款
https://nicolecat.com/cat/privacy.html
https://nicolecat.com/cat/terms.html

• 聯絡我們
如果您玩得開心，請隨時聯絡我們：
support@nicolecat.com

hk.trackCensoredName: Way of the Hunter Wild America
hk.trackName: Way of the Hunter Wild America
hk.releaseNotes:
- Improved memory consumption and stability by loading the menus on demand
- You can now fast travel to your car
- Added an option to deactivate the slow-motion effect while holding breath
- Fixed problems when opening photo mode in certain situations while driving
- Fixed that markers are always shown after restarting the game, even when turned off
- Fixed a problem with the reload button on tablets
- Many other fixes and improvements
hk.description:
《Way of the Hunter》將推出手機端系列首作，太平洋西北地區的壯美景觀隨之鋪陳眼前。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

《獵人征途》的野生動物外型真實而美麗，且具備符合現實的動物群體行為特徵，提供玩家全面且真實的狩獵體驗，讓人能完全沉浸在遊戲世界。親眼目睹複雜多樣的生態環境產生的變化，周遭環境會因為你的行動而出現變動及反應。瞭解真正的獵人所代表的意義，並充分運用自己的技能來戰勝考驗。

面對人道狩獵的挑戰、搭配引人入勝的故事情節進行遊戲，或是單純地在這富饒的自然環境中自由狩獵。

* 數十種細節精緻的動物物種與真實的行為模式，為你帶來真正身歷其境的狩獵體驗
* 醒目標示動物跡象、血跡分析，以及能夠倒回觀看子彈鏡頭的射擊回顧畫面，這些功能都能讓您像專業獵人一樣狩獵
* 使用獵人感官將重要詳情和資訊醒目標示出來，或者關閉獵人感官，讓遊戲體驗更具挑戰性
* 複雜的戰利品系統，其會根據身體素質與年齡等多項因素產生獨一無二的鹿角和動物頭角
* 細膩又自然的動物動作，以及動物察覺到玩家存在時的真實反應
* 24 小時的日夜循環，再加上風和天氣的變化
* 真實彈道與子彈物理模擬
* 大量槍枝和裝備選擇，其中包含證照管制裝備，例如：Bushnell、Federal、Leupold、Primos、Remington 和 Steyr Arms
* 遊戲內的經營模式讓玩家可以獵取野味之後，將販賣肉品所得的資金用於購買新裝備、狩獵通行證以及戰利品狩獵台上的標本
* 引人入勝的故事情節，訴說著一段關於家族狩獵事業的掙扎糾葛，以及圍繞其間的競爭關係和友誼
* 直觀的相片模式，讓你可以捕捉並分享自己最愛的瞬間
* 使用手柄或觸控控制追蹤獵物
* 優化手機端操控，兼顧舒適與效率

警告：

mo.description:
Onyx is a revolutionary new utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data.

Using cutting edge AI processing, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.
— Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought.
— Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx, allowing you to zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal.
— Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye.
— Change the time on a photo of a clock.
— Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it seem that it was removed earlier.

...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it.

Onyx is particularly great for a reveal within something ephemeral. Take a photo of someone's shadow, a landscape shot of the clouds, a flicker on a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice.

* Variable Delayed Input
Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken.

* Cutting Edge Technology
Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely.

* Create Unlimited Effects
Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took.

* Your Integrations. Their Camera
The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket.

* Invisible, Advanced Technology
As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx's advanced technology remains hidden and inconspicuous.

* Third Party Integrations
Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including:
— Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input
— Native voice input
— WebFX's Wrist Gestures
— WikiTest
— PeekSmith
— Bridge

...and any compatible third-party app.

Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits.

Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

mo.description:
《Way of the Hunter》將推出手機端系列首作，太平洋西北地區的壯美景觀隨之鋪陳眼前。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

《獵人征途》的野生動物外型真實而美麗，且具備符合現實的動物群體行為特徵，提供玩家全面且真實的狩獵體驗，讓人能完全沉浸在遊戲世界。親眼目睹複雜多樣的生態環境產生的變化，周遭環境會因為你的行動而出現變動及反應。瞭解真正的獵人所代表的意義，並充分運用自己的技能來戰勝考驗。

面對人道狩獵的挑戰、搭配引人入勝的故事情節進行遊戲，或是單純地在這富饒的自然環境中自由狩獵。

* 數十種細節精緻的動物物種與真實的行為模式，為你帶來真正身歷其境的狩獵體驗
* 醒目標示動物跡象、血跡分析，以及能夠倒回觀看子彈鏡頭的射擊回顧畫面，這些功能都能讓您像專業獵人一樣狩獵
* 使用獵人感官將重要詳情和資訊醒目標示出來，或者關閉獵人感官，讓遊戲體驗更具挑戰性
* 複雜的戰利品系統，其會根據身體素質與年齡等多項因素產生獨一無二的鹿角和動物頭角
* 細膩又自然的動物動作，以及動物察覺到玩家存在時的真實反應
* 24 小時的日夜循環，再加上風和天氣的變化
* 真實彈道與子彈物理模擬
* 大量槍枝和裝備選擇，其中包含證照管制裝備，例如：Bushnell、Federal、Leupold、Primos、Remington 和 Steyr Arms
* 遊戲內的經營模式讓玩家可以獵取野味之後，將販賣肉品所得的資金用於購買新裝備、狩獵通行證以及戰利品狩獵台上的標本
* 引人入勝的故事情節，訴說著一段關於家族狩獵事業的掙扎糾葛，以及圍繞其間的競爭關係和友誼
* 直觀的相片模式，讓你可以捕捉並分享自己最愛的瞬間
* 使用手柄或觸控控制追蹤獵物
* 優化手機端操控，兼顧舒適與效率

不支援記憶體小於 4 GB 的裝置！
您需要至少 6 GB 記憶體的裝置才能使用最高圖形設定。

【漢末霸業】基本介紹

【三國誌:漢末霸業】是由成都龍遊天下工作室精心制作的壹款回合制君主扮演模式的SLG遊戲。主要是以國人自己對三國遊戲的新思維，新角度來打造不壹樣的三國世界。在回歸傳統策略類的基礎上深度刻畫了三國各城市之間的地域差異以及每個武將自身能力和特性的異同，而在戰鬥方面突出結合天時地利人和的調配來進行作戰的魅力。


正式版遊戲特色：
壹：經典的白描繡像畫風，古樸典雅
人物頭像采用經典的《三國演義》連環畫的白描繡像畫風和上色。遊戲界面采用古風古韻設計，地道中國風。
二：簡單易上手的政務管理模式：
基礎的內政安排、人事探索、軍事偵察、技術開發都采用放置類管理模式，減少繁瑣的重復操作，讓玩家能聚焦其他事件。君主扮演模式，玩家只需要關註首都以及國家的管理。其他城市交給太守進行管理。使用方針給分城下達不同的軍政指令。

三：極其豐富的遊戲內容設定：
	超過1300名登場武將（包括歷史和演義武將）。 
	30項武將基本能力的細分化設計，更能體現武將之間的差異。
	超過300種以上的獨立配置的武將特性，全面凸顯武將個體差異。 
	超過500種有考據的物品寶物設定。多種分類劃分來滿足不同的喜好需求。
	近六十多個不同類型的城市，200多種有據可考的城市特征和特產。
	豐富的技術研究和開發項目，體現了科技對勢力發展的重要性。
	三大基本兵種和近二十種特殊兵種構成豐富的兵種體系。
	超豐富的官職系統。
	各種自然現象和事件災害模擬出多災多難的三國時期。 
	豐富的來訪事情，商人、仙人、名士、名醫、名匠、劍客遊走四方，引發各種功能事件。

四：回歸經典回合制，側重策略性排兵布陣的戰鬥系統
	天氣和地形、地塊高度的引入更加凸顯天時地利要素對戰爭的影響。
	野戰和攻城戰功能獨立分開。攻城有攻城車，霹靂車，井闌，守城有投石機、床弩、塞門刀車。更能凸顯攻守之間的平衡關系。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

us.description:
Onyx is a revolutionary new utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data.

Using cutting edge AI processing, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.
— Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought.
— Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx, allowing you to zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal.
— Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye.
— Change the time on a photo of a clock.
— Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it seem that it was removed earlier.

...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it.

Onyx is particularly great for a reveal within something ephemeral. Take a photo of someone's shadow, a landscape shot of the clouds, a flicker on a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice.

* Variable Delayed Input
Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken.

* Cutting Edge Technology
Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely.

* Create Unlimited Effects
Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took.

* Your Integrations. Their Camera
The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket.

* Invisible, Advanced Technology
As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx's advanced technology remains hidden and inconspicuous.

* Third Party Integrations
Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including:
— Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input
— Native voice input
— WebFX's Wrist Gestures
— WikiTest
— PeekSmith
— Bridge

...and any compatible third-party app.

Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits.

Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

tr.description:
Onyx is a revolutionary new utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data.

Using cutting edge AI processing, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.
— Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought.
— Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx, allowing you to zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal.
— Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye.
— Change the time on a photo of a clock.
— Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it seem that it was removed earlier.

...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it.

Onyx is particularly great for a reveal within something ephemeral. Take a photo of someone's shadow, a landscape shot of the clouds, a flicker on a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice.

* Variable Delayed Input
Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken.

* Cutting Edge Technology
Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely.

* Create Unlimited Effects
Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took.

* Your Integrations. Their Camera
The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket.

* Invisible, Advanced Technology
As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx's advanced technology remains hidden and inconspicuous.

* Third Party Integrations
Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including:
— Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input
— Native voice input
— WebFX's Wrist Gestures
— WikiTest
— PeekSmith
— Bridge

...and any compatible third-party app.

Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits.

Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

After a devastating earthquake strikes Istanbul, can you find the woman you love?

In a fully hand-drawn Istanbul, embark on a journey that tests your instincts and hopes. After the earthquake, you must cross the city — from Bakırköy to Üsküdar — to find the woman you love.

Explore a hand-drawn, post-quake Istanbul — from shattered historic neighborhoods to the edge of the Bosphorus. Every corner hides new stories and challenges. In the heart of chaos, survival is not enough. You must do it without losing your honor.

On your journey to save your girlfriend, you’ll face not only physical obstacles but also emotional and psychological trials. The people you meet among the ruins—and their stories—will push you to make difficult moral choices.

To move forward, you’ll need to solve puzzles, crack safe codes, pick locks, explore devastated locations, and manage your energy wisely.

Quakeline is more than just a game; it is a project that aims to raise awareness about the possible impact of a real earthquake in Istanbul. Through its fictional yet grounded narrative, the game invites players to reflect on survival, resilience, and the human spirit.

Witness the struggle to survive—and the power of hope.
In this unforgettable journey, you’ll not only navigate through debris but also discover the deepest and purest parts of what it means to be human.

tr.description:
Border Officer – A Document, Control, and Security Game

Every day is a new day at the border.
Every day, new faces arrive.
Behind every face lies a story, a dream… or a threat.

Border Officer puts you at the center of the toughest decisions as a border officer in a document control and security game.
You must act according to rules, documents, and presidential orders; the cost of a small mistake can be paid by the entire country.

Your Mission
	•	Inspect the documents of incoming characters
	•	Examine stamps and detect forged documents
	•	Scan bags using X-ray screening and find illegal items
	•	Identify and capture wanted criminals
	•	Earn money by making the right decisions

Scanning, Searching, and Security

Not every bag is innocent.
Not every document is valid.

Protect the border using scanning and search systems. Maintain security—but do not reject the innocent.
Sometimes, the right choice is not to follow the rules.
Sometimes, the only right choice is the rules.

Consequences of Your Decisions

Watch the impact of your decisions in the journalist’s broadcast at the end of each day.
Some choices satisfy the public; others push the country toward chaos.

The border is yours. The decision is yours. The consequences are ours.

pt.description:
Onyx is a revolutionary new utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data.

Using cutting edge AI processing, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera.

For example:
— Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet.
— Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal.
— Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought.
— Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx, allowing you to zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal.
— Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye.
— Change the time on a photo of a clock.
— Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it seem that it was removed earlier.

...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it.

Onyx is particularly great for a reveal within something ephemeral. Take a photo of someone's shadow, a landscape shot of the clouds, a flicker on a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice.

* Variable Delayed Input
Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken.

* Cutting Edge Technology
Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely.

* Create Unlimited Effects
Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took.

* Your Integrations. Their Camera
The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket.

* Invisible, Advanced Technology
As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx's advanced technology remains hidden and inconspicuous.

* Third Party Integrations
Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including:
— Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input
— Native voice input
— WebFX's Wrist Gestures
— WikiTest
— PeekSmith
— Bridge

...and any compatible third-party app.

Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits.

Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

pt.description:
Aproveite a primeira entrada da série móvel Way of the Hunter, ambientada no belo noroeste do Pacífico norte-americano.

Esta experiência de caça autêntica deixa você caçar e explorar ambientes abertos enormes nos Nez Perce Valleys dos Estados Unidos. Encontre animais realistas em belos habitats naturais e utilize diversas réplicas detalhadas de armas.

Way of the Hunter oferece uma experiência altamente imersiva e integrada, com vida selvagem deslumbrante e comportamento realista dos grupos de animais. Testemunhe as transformações em ecossistemas complexos, que reagem e se adaptam ao que você fizer. Aprenda a caçar de verdade e ponha suas habilidades à prova.

Enfrente os desafios da caça ética com uma história cativante, ou simplesmente divirta-se caçando em ambientes deslumbrantes.

* Dezenas de espécies incrivelmente detalhadas com comportamentos realistas para proporcionar uma experiência de caça verdadeiramente imersiva.
* Cace como um profissional com recursos que destacam sinais de animais e analisam respingos de sangue. Analise a trajetória dos seus disparos com a câmera rebobinável.
* Use seu sentido de caçador para destacar detalhes e informações importantes, ou desative-o.
* O complexo sistema de troféus gera chifres exclusivos com base em vários fatores, como estado físico e idade das caças.
* Animações e reações de animais naturais e sofisticadas ao sentir a presença dos jogadores.
* Ciclos de dia e noite com 24 horas, além de vento e clima variáveis.
* Simulação realística de balística e de física de projéteis.
* Grande seleção de armas de fogo e equipamentos, incluindo itens licenciados das empresas Bushnell, Federal, Leupold, Primos, Remington e Steyr Arms.
* A economia do jogo permite a você caçar e vender a carne para comprar mais equipamentos, licenças de caça e serviços de taxidermia para seus troféus.
* Uma história cativante sobre os obstáculos enfrentados por uma empresa familiar de caça e a rivalidade e amizades que a cercam.
* Modo de fotografia intuitivo, para capturar e compartilhar seus momentos favoritos.
* Rastreie a sua presa usando ou o gamepad ou os controles de toque
* Controle otimizado e eficiente para dispositivos móveis

Com esta aplicação, pode fazer chamadas automáticas para os números que desejar de forma eficiente e personalizada. Pode definir o número de repetições, o intervalo entre chamadas, adicionar um posto, ativar a vibração antes de marcar e até mesmo agendar as suas chamadas utilizando um calendário integrado. A Auto Redial App oferece ainda uma interface simples e intuitiva, um histórico de chamadas detalhado e várias opções de personalização para se adequar às suas necessidades.

Esta aplicação é ideal para quem precisa de fazer chamadas repetitivas automaticamente — como uma chamada para uma consulta, uma nova tentativa de chamada quando o número está ocupado ou contactar serviços onde a linha está ocupada.

Principais características:
- Redisque automaticamente as chamadas ocupadas ou não atendidas.
- Defina o número de tentativas e os intervalos de tempo.
- Agende chamadas com antecedência via calendário.
- Adicione os ramais automaticamente após a marcação.
- Ative a vibração antes de cada rediscagem.
- Histórico de chamadas e estatísticas de novas tentativas.

Perfeito para:
- Marcação de consultas (médicas, embaixadas, etc.)
- Atendimento ao cliente ou suporte técnico
- Telefonar para repartições públicas
- Freelancers e empresários a acompanhar clientes

Quer esteja a ligar para marcar uma consulta médica, falar com o serviço de apoio ao cliente ou apenas a tentar ligar-se quando a linha está ocupada, esta aplicação poupa tempo e frustração.
